title: Lead Investment Banker at New India Assurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at New India Assurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
